notableEvents.label: Nick Castellanos reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Castellanos reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Andrew Vaughn.

notableEvents.label: Sung-Mun Song pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sung-Mun Song grounds into a force out, shortstop Joey Ortiz to second baseman David Hamilton. Nick Castellanos scores. Freddy Fermin to 3rd. Bryce Johnson out at 2nd. Sung-Mun Song to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Griffin Canning on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Garrett Mitchell steals (6) 2nd base. Garrett Mitchell to 3rd. Garrett Mitchell advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Freddy Fermin.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Castellanos reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Andrew Vaughn.
